description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named mac-linux-ci that runs on push and pull request events. Use a concurrency strategy to cancel in-progress runs when a new run is queued. Define two matrix jobs, ubuntu and mac, each using a generic CI workflow template with different parameters. The ubuntu job runs on ubuntu-20.04 with gcc and clang compilers, and Release and Debug builds. The mac job runs on macos-11 with clang compiler and Release and Debug builds.
